title: pytest-agent-eval transcript
description: A multi-turn LLM evaluation transcript. Files matching this schema inside a configured yaml_dirs directory are collected as pytest tests.

id.description: Unique test identifier; becomes the pytest test name.

threshold.description: Fraction of runs that must pass for the test to pass.

runs.description: Number of times to execute the full transcript.

turns.description: Ordered conversation turns; history accumulates across them.

user.description: The user message for this turn.

audio.description: Optional WAV path for voice adapters, resolved relative to this YAML file.

expect.description: Expectations for the agent's reply on this turn. All fields optional.

reply_contains_any.description: At least one substring must appear in the reply (case-insensitive).

reply_contains_all.description: Every substring must appear in the reply (case-insensitive).

reply_matches_any.description: At least one regex (re.search, case-insensitive) must match the reply.

reply_matches_all.description: Every regex (re.search, case-insensitive) must match the reply.

tool_calls_include.description: Tool names that must appear in this turn's tool calls.

tool_calls_exclude.description: Tool names that must NOT appear in this turn's tool calls.

tool_calls_ordered.description: If true, tool_calls_include must appear in the given order.

tool_calls_args.description: Assertions on the arguments of specific tool calls.

rubric.description: Natural-language criteria the LLM judge evaluates against.

model.description: pydantic-ai model ID override (e.g. 'openai:gpt-4o'); falls back to [tool.agent_eval] config.

tool.description: Name of the tool whose call arguments to check.

args.description: Expected arguments for the deterministic check.

mode.description: subset: expected items must appear in the observed args; exact: full equality.
